# FIDOCX

FIDOCX is a Windows desktop application for document automation.

## Description

FIDOCX generates Word and PDF documents from Excel, CSV, JSON or forms using DOCX templates. It allows users to load data, map fields to a Word template, validate information and generate documents individually or in bulk.

## Main features

- Generate Word documents from Excel.
- Export documents to PDF.
- Use DOCX templates with dynamic fields.
- Validate data before document generation.
- Reuse configurable document workflows.
- Load data from Excel, CSV, JSON or forms.

## Use cases

FIDOCX can be used to generate certificates, letters, contracts, reports, forms, records and administrative documents.

## Requirements

- Windows 10 or Windows 11.
- LibreOffice is optional and used for PDF export.

## Official pages

English: https://cartolin.github.io/FIDOCX/en/
